---
title: "Opinii"
---

Aici vor fi publicate articole de opinie și analize.

## Contributors.ro

- Marius Wamsiedel, [„Suveranismul – o lectură sociologică”](https://www.contributors.ro/suveranismul-o-lectura-sociologica/)

## Priors & Posteriors

- Marius Ghincea, [„The Great Transformation of Romanian Foreign Policy”](https://priorsandposteriors.substack.com/p/the-great-transformation-of-romanian)
